- CI will validate the skill structure automatically
- Don't edit index.json or SKILL.md manually — they're auto-regenerated on merge

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill file lives at `skills/<domain>/<name>.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter includes `name`, `description`, `urlPatterns` (at minimum)
- [ ] `name` is kebab-case
- [ ] `urlPatterns` use valid glob syntax
- [ ] JS code is self-contained (no external imports or CDN scripts)
- [ ] Tested against a real page in a real browser
